series_metadata.series_title: Real Property Conveyance Fee Statement of Value and Receipt
series_metadata.series_description: The Real Property Conveyance Fee Statement is an affidavit which identifies real estate sold and provides information such as the property's assessed value and selling price used in market studies conducted by the Ohio Department of Taxation for purposes of real property assessment equalization.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Current and preceding 3 years retained for counties scheduled for sexennial re-appraissal or triennial update in the current year. For counties not scheduled for re-approaisal or triennial update in the current year, the DTE form 100's on file will be those for the current year and years since the last re-appraisal or update, with no forms being maintained longer than three years prior to the current year. ; Paper: Current and preceding 3 years retained for counties scheduled for sexennial re-appraissal or triennial update in the current year. For counties not scheduled for re-approaisal or triennial update in the current year, the DTE form 100's on file will be those for the current year and years since the last re-appraisal or update, with no forms being maintained longer than three years prior to the current year., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
